_comment: The size ratchet for PRODUCT_SPEC.md (SPEC INV-264). The bound is bytes-per-criterion: the byte count of the spec's criterion lines alone (glossary and preamble excluded) divided by the count of criteria in its body. A delivery may lower it or leave it; no delivery may raise it (raising is a change to Requirement 4, INV-265). The ratchet governs PRODUCT_SPEC.md only; the other documents keep their flat byte bound (check-doc-bound.py).
reason: not yet seeded — the initial bound is the value measured at the migration-end freeze, recorded by the freeze actor (INV-264 criterion 3). Until that freeze the spec is not yet in the requirements format, so the ratchet has nothing to measure; the gate passes with this stated reason rather than red-ing on an absent bound.
